full_text:
Xu Yun (Shicong) 許允 (士宗)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Yun (許允), styledShicong (士宗). Negotiated Cao Shuang’s surrender, friends with Wei loyalists and Wei Emperor. Xu Yun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xu Yun lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
